name: recallnest_checkpoint_continuity

checkpoint.task: RecallNest continuity layer — 状态交接给下个窗口
checkpoint.summary: RecallNest Phase 3/4 并行推进中。核心三件套 store_memory、checkpoint_session、resume_context 已上线，当前继续收 resume_context compose。
decisions: Phase 3/4 并行推进，continuity layer 是当前核心方向
nextActions: 继续优化 resume_context compose 质量

notes: When a project checkpoint exists, resume_context should prefer checkpoint-led continuity over noisy transcript fragments.

name: project_scope_checkpoint_continuity
task: 继续这个项目，不要让我重复前情

checkpoint.task: RecallNest continuity acceptance — project scope handoff
checkpoint.summary: RecallNest 项目范围下已完成 continuity baseline setup、doctor baseline 和 headless Claude Code smoke，下一步继续扩 continuity eval case。
decisions: 继续把 project-scope continuity 做成稳定回归信号
nextActions: 补更多 scoped project continuity cases
决定 CC smoke 的 inference 告警是否升级为失败

notes: Project-scoped checkpoints should compose cleanly when the scope uses the explicit `project:` key.

name: project_task_pivot_recall

checkpoint.summary: RecallNest 已补上 HTTP auto-recall，下一步把 task-pivot 的主动 recall 变成 smoke 和 eval 的稳定回归信号。
decisions: 任务切换时也要先回忆，不能只在 continue 场景触发
nextActions: 补 Claude Code smoke task-pivot case

notes: A named project task pivot should still surface continuity context and search_memory guidance even without an explicit continue prompt.
